untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking cumulative volume imbalance (buy vs. sell side), dollar imbalance magnitude, and multi-tick run persistence without explicit reversal. These require order flow decomposition (cumulative buy/sell volume) and sequential tick state tracking that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also references undefined threshold parameters (THRESHOLD_NEEDED) that must be calibrated via walk-forward analysis, not static values.
translation_notes: This is an event-driven, volume-imbalance bar sampling rule that cannot be fully expressed with price-based or aggregate volume indicators alone. It fundamentally requires: (1) signed volume (buy vs sell side separation), (2) cumulative state tracking across ticks, and (3) dynamic threshold calibration. A partial proxy using vol_ratio_20 or hvol_20 would lose the directional imbalance and reversal logic essential to the rule.
